description: Product Owner prompt pack — 5 prompts for product managers and owners

prompts.title: Write User Story
prompts.desc: Draft a well-formed user story with acceptance criteria.
prompts.prompt:
[ROLE]    You are an experienced Product Owner.
[TASK]    Write a well-formed user story for the feature or need described below.
[STYLE]   Clear and outcome-focused.
[FORMAT]  User story in As a / I want / So that format + 3-5 acceptance criteria in Gherkin (Given/When/Then).
[INPUT]

prompts.title: Define Acceptance Criteria
prompts.desc: Generate detailed, testable acceptance criteria from a feature description.
prompts.prompt:
[ROLE]    You are an experienced Product Owner.
[TASK]    Write detailed acceptance criteria for the feature or user story below.
[STYLE]   Specific, testable, unambiguous.
[FORMAT]  Numbered list in Gherkin format (Given/When/Then). Include edge cases.
[INPUT]

prompts.title: Sprint Retrospective Summary
prompts.desc: Summarise retro notes into structured actions.
prompts.prompt:
[ROLE]    You are a Product Owner facilitating a sprint retrospective.
[TASK]    Summarise the retrospective notes below into a structured output.
[STYLE]   Concise, constructive, action-oriented.
[FORMAT]  Three sections: What Went Well, What To Improve, Action Items (owner + action).
[INPUT]

prompts.title: Feature Prioritisation Brief
prompts.desc: Write a prioritisation brief for a backlog of features.
prompts.prompt:
[ROLE]    You are a Product Owner at a B2B SaaS company.
[TASK]    Write a prioritisation brief for the features or requests listed below.
[STYLE]   Objective, data-informed, stakeholder-friendly.
[FORMAT]  Score each item on User Impact, Business Value, Effort (Low/Med/High). Add recommended priority order with rationale.
[INPUT]

prompts.title: Stakeholder Update
prompts.desc: Write a concise weekly product update for stakeholders.
prompts.prompt:
[ROLE]    You are a Product Owner sending a weekly stakeholder update.
[TASK]    Write a concise product update based on the notes below.
[STYLE]   Executive-friendly, outcome-focused, no jargon.
[FORMAT]  Sections: Summary (2 sentences), Shipped This Week, In Progress, Blockers, Next Week.
[INPUT]
